metadata.title: Find Golf Courses in Norway – Maps, Info & Reviews
metadata.description: Search and find golf courses across Norway. View maps, read reviews and get useful info about courses in your area.

about.metaDescription: Norway's most complete directory of golf courses. Over 160 golf courses from across Norway, covering all regions.
about.subtitle: Norway's most complete directory of golf courses
about.visionText: golfkart.no was created with one simple purpose: to make it easier for golfers to find and discover golf courses in Norway. We believe that golf should be accessible to everyone, and that the right information can help both beginners and experienced players find the perfect course for their next round.
about.offerCompleteText: Over 160 golf courses from across Norway, covering all regions. We cover everything from championship courses to local 9-hole facilities.
about.offerDetailedText: Each course has comprehensive information about holes, par, length, terrain, designer, and year built. We also show course rating and slope for all tee options.
about.offerPricesText: See green fees for weekdays, weekends, seniors and juniors. We also show prices for golf cart, pull cart and club rental, as well as any special offers.
about.offerRatingsText: We aggregate ratings from multiple platforms like Hole19, 18Birdies, Google and Facebook, giving you a combined rating based on thousands of reviews.
about.offerFacilitiesText: Find out if the course has a driving range, putting green, restaurant, pro shop, simulator, golf lessons and much more before you visit.
about.offerWeatherText: Weather forecasts are updated twice daily, so you can always plan your round of golf under optimal conditions. See temperature, wind, precipitation and UV index.
about.offerMapText: Explore golf courses via our interactive map of Norway, or find courses near you with our "Courses Nearby" feature. Get directions directly in Google Maps.
about.whyUsText1: There are many ways to find golf courses, but few places gather all the information you need in one place. golfkart.no is built by golfers, for golfers, with a focus on Norwegian conditions and Norwegian courses.
about.whyUsText2: We continuously update our database with new information and work closely with golf clubs across the country to ensure that the information is accurate and up-to-date. Our ambition is to be the first place Norwegian golfers go when looking for their next favourite course.
about.missingCourseText: We are continuously adding more courses. Get in touch if you are missing information about a specific course.

contact.metaDescription: Get in touch with golfkart.no. We would love to hear from you about questions, feedback or updated information about golf courses in Norway.
contact.formSubtitle: Fill out the form below and we will get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.directContactSubtitle: You can also contact us directly by email:
contact.addOrUpdateCourseDesc: Do you own a golf course or have updated information?
contact.aboutSectionText: We are Norway's most complete directory of golf courses. Our goal is to help golfers find and explore golf courses across Norway.

contactForm.successMessage: Thank you for your message! We will be in touch soon.
contactForm.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
contactForm.submitError: Could not send the message. Please try again.
contactForm.requiredFields: * All fields are required. We usually respond within 1-2 business days.

privacy.metaDescription: Privacy Policy for golfkart.no - how we collect and use information.
privacy.section1Text: This privacy policy describes how golfkart.no ("we", "us" or "the website") collects, uses and protects information when you visit our website. We are committed to protecting your privacy in accordance with applicable privacy legislation, including the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and Norwegian data protection law.
privacy.section2_1Intro: When you visit our website, we automatically collect certain information:
privacy.section2_1Item6: Pages you visit on our website
privacy.section2_2Text: If you choose to use the "See courses near me" feature, we will request access to your geographical location. This information is only stored temporarily in your browser's sessionStorage and is not shared with third parties.
privacy.section2_3Text: If you contact us via email or the contact form, we collect the information you voluntarily provide (name, email address, message).
privacy.section3Intro: We use collected information for the following purposes:
privacy.section3Item1: To provide and improve our services
privacy.section3Item2: To show relevant content based on your location (if you have given permission)
privacy.section3Item3: To analyse usage patterns and optimise the website
privacy.section3Item4: To respond to enquiries and provide customer service
privacy.section3Item5: To protect against misuse and unlawful activity
privacy.section4Text: We use cookies and similar technologies to improve your experience on the website. Cookies are small text files stored on your device. You can control and/or delete cookies as you wish through your browser settings.
privacy.section5Intro: We do not sell, trade or rent personal data to third parties. We may share information in the following cases:
privacy.section5Item1: With service providers who help us operate the website (e.g. hosting)
privacy.section5Item2: When required by law or to protect our legal rights
privacy.section5Item3: With your consent or at your request
privacy.section6Text: We implement appropriate technical and organisational security measures to protect your personal data against unauthorised access, alteration, disclosure or destruction. However, no method of transmission over the Internet or electronic storage is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacy.section7Intro: Under the GDPR and Norwegian data protection law, you have the following rights:
privacy.section7RightAccessText: You may request a copy of the personal data we hold about you
privacy.section7RightCorrectionText: You may ask us to correct inaccurate or incomplete data
privacy.section7RightDeletionText: You may ask us to delete your personal data
privacy.section7RightRestrictionText: You may request that the processing of your data be restricted
privacy.section7RightPortabilityText: You may request to receive your data in a structured format
privacy.section7RightObjectionText: You may object to our processing of your data
privacy.section7ExerciseRights: To exercise these rights, please contact us via the <link>contact form</link>.
privacy.section8Text: Our website contains links to external websites (e.g. golf courses' own websites). We are not responsible for the privacy practices or content of these external websites. We encourage you to read the privacy policy of each website you visit.
privacy.section9Text: Our website is not directed at children under 16 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children under 16. If you are a parent or guardian and are aware that your child has provided us with personal data, please contact us.
privacy.section10Text: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new privacy policy on this page and updating the "Last updated" date. We encourage you to review this privacy policy regularly for any changes.
privacy.section11Text: If you have questions about this privacy policy, please contact us via our <link>contact form</link>.
privacy.acceptanceNotice: By using golfkart.no you accept this privacy policy and our <link>terms of use</link>.

terms.metaDescription: Terms of Use for golfkart.no - rules and conditions for using the website.
terms.section1Text: By accessing and using golfkart.no ("the website", "the service", "we", "us"), you agree to be bound by these terms of use. If you do not accept these terms, you must not use the website. We reserve the right to change these terms at any time without notice.
terms.section2Text: golfkart.no is an information service that provides an overview of golf courses in Norway. The website offers information about courses, facilities, prices, contact information and ratings. We strive to keep the information up-to-date and accurate, but cannot guarantee completeness or accuracy at all times.
terms.section3Item1: Access and view the content on the website for personal, non-commercial use
terms.section3Item2: Share links to individual pages on the website
terms.section3Item3: Use the search function to find golf courses
terms.section4ScrapingText: Use robots, spiders, crawlers, scrapers or other automated tools or processes to access, copy or collect data from the website
terms.section4DownloadText: Download significant portions of the website's database or content
terms.section4ApiText: Use or attempt to use unauthorised APIs or endpoints
terms.section4DatabaseText: Copy, reproduce or mirror the website's database or content in whole or to a significant extent
terms.section4CompetingText: Use data from the website to build a competing service or database
terms.section4SecurityText: Circumvent or attempt to circumvent technical limitations, rate limits or security measures
terms.section4ReverseText: Decompile, reverse engineer or attempt to access the source code of the website
terms.section4Other1: Use the website for illegal purposes or in violation of applicable laws
terms.section4Other2: Publish or transmit spam, malware or other harmful content
terms.section4Other3: Disrupt or damage the website's functionality or infrastructure
terms.section4Other4: Impersonate or falsify the website or its content
terms.section4Other5: Use the website to harass, abuse or harm other users
terms.section4Other6: Collect or store personal data about other users
terms.section4Other7: Resell or commercialise access to the website without written permission
terms.section5Text1: All content on golfkart.no, including but not limited to text, graphics, logos, images, data, database collections and software, is owned by or licensed to us and is protected by Norwegian and international copyright and intellectual property law.
terms.section5Text2: Unauthorised use of the content may constitute a violation of copyright, trademark or other laws.
terms.section6Intro: The website and all content are provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, either express or implied, including but not limited to:
terms.section6Item1: Accuracy, reliability or completeness of the information
terms.section6Item2: That the service will be uninterrupted or error-free
terms.section6Item3: That any errors will be corrected
terms.section6Disclaimer: Information about prices, opening hours, facilities and other details may change without notice. We always recommend contacting golf courses directly to confirm up-to-date information.
terms.section7Text: To the extent permitted by law, golfkart.no, its owners, partners or suppliers shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special or consequential damages arising from or in connection with your use of the website, including but not limited to:
terms.section7Item3: Errors or omissions in the content
terms.section7Item4: Actions taken based on information from the website
terms.section8Text: The website may contain links to third-party sites (e.g. golf courses' own websites). We are not responsible for the content, privacy practices or availability of these external websites. Links do not imply that we endorse or have any affiliation with these websites.
terms.section9Intro: We actively monitor for violations of these terms. In the event of suspected or proven violations, we reserve the right to:
terms.section9Item1: Immediately block your access to the website
terms.section9Item2: Report the activity to relevant authorities
terms.section9Item3: Take legal action, including claims for damages
terms.section9Item4: Share information about violations with third parties as permitted by law
terms.section9Closing: Automated data scraping, systematic downloading or other violations may constitute offences under Norwegian copyright and data protection law.
terms.section10Text: These terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with Norwegian law. Any disputes shall be resolved by Norwegian courts.
terms.section11Text: We reserve the right to change these terms of use at any time. Changes take effect immediately upon publication on this page. Your continued use of the website after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
terms.section12Text: If you have questions about these terms of use, wish to request permission for special use of the content, or wish to report suspicious activity, please contact us via our <link>contact form</link>.
terms.scrapingNoticeText: Automated data scraping, systematic downloading or other unauthorised mass copying of content from golfkart.no is strictly prohibited and may result in legal consequences. All attempts at such activity are logged and monitored. For legitimate data use or API access, please contact us for permission.
terms.acceptanceNotice: By using golfkart.no you accept these terms of use and our <link>privacy policy</link>.

blog.metaDescription: Read our blog posts about golf courses, tips and news from the world of golf in Norway
blog.subtitle: Read our articles about golf courses, tips and news from the world of golf

cookieConsent.bannerText: We use cookies to improve your browsing experience, show personalised ads or content, and analyse our traffic. By clicking "Accept all", you consent to our use of cookies.
cookieConsent.modalIntro: We use cookies to help you navigate efficiently and perform certain functions. You can find detailed information about all cookies under each consent category below. Cookies that are categorised as "Necessary" are stored in your browser as they are essential for enabling the basic functionalities of the website.
cookieConsent.modalIntroExtra: We also use third-party cookies that help us analyse how you use this website, store your preferences and provide content and advertisements that are relevant to you. These cookies will only be stored in your browser with your prior consent. You may choose to enable or disable some or all of these cookies, but disabling some of them may affect your browsing experience.
cookieConsent.categoryNecessaryDesc: Necessary cookies are essential for basic website functionality, and the website will not work as intended without them. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable data.
cookieConsent.categoryFunctionalDesc: Functional cookies help you perform certain functions such as sharing the content of the website on social media platforms, collecting feedback and other third-party features.
cookieConsent.categoryAnalyticsDesc: Analytical cookies are used to understand how visitors interact with the website. These cookies help provide information about the number of visitors, bounce rate, traffic source, etc.
cookieConsent.categoryPerformanceDesc: Performance cookies are used to understand and analyse the key performance indexes of the website, which helps to deliver a better user experience for visitors.
cookieConsent.categoryAdvertisingDesc: Advertising cookies are used to deliver visitors with customised advertisements based on the pages they visited before and to analyse the effectiveness of the advertising campaign.
